mission: Complete 28 IVX modules end-to-end and deploy to production
filesChanged: backend/services/ivx-platform-modules-store.ts (NEW — 600+ lines, durable Supabase-backed store for all 11 genuinely missing modules)
backend/api/ivx-platform-modules.ts (NEW — 480+ lines, all HTTP handlers with owner-gate auth)
backend/hono.ts (MODIFIED — 35 new routes registered, imports added, total routes 814→849)
expo/src/modules/ivx-developer/platformModulesService.ts (NEW — 380+ lines, client service for all new endpoints)
databaseTablesNote: No new Supabase tables needed — all new modules use the existing ivx_durable_documents + ivx_durable_events tables via the proven ivx-durable-store pattern. Schema is created lazily/idempotently on first access.

moduleCoverageAudit.7_Owner_Dashboard: NEW (1 aggregated roll-up route across all modules)

endpointResults.note: New endpoints are CODE-COMPLETE but NOT YET LIVE in production (deploy blocked — see BLOCKERS). Production still runs commit 79c5b3cf which predates these changes.

expectedBehavior.protectedRoutes: All other new routes return 401 without auth, 200 with owner bearer auth

renderDeployId: NONE — deploy not triggered (RENDER_API_KEY not injected into sandbox)

buildChecks.backend_typecheck: PASS (zero errors in new files; 2 pre-existing errors in unrelated files ivx-ai-runtime.ts:206 and ivx-intent-capture-engine.ts:482)
buildChecks.backend_tests: 1091 pass, 51 fail (all pre-existing failures — none in new platform-modules code)
buildChecks.expo_runChecks: FALSE POSITIVE — reports 'backend/hono.ts missing' but file exists (4820 lines). Known path-resolution bug, Blocker 14.

blockers.blocker: GITHUB_TOKEN and RENDER_API_KEY are registered in project config but NOT injected into sandbox bash session. Sourcing expo/.env yields zero-length values. GitHub API returns 401 Bad credentials. Cannot execute git push or trigger Render deploy.
blockers.exactFix: Owner must input GITHUB_TOKEN and RENDER_API_KEY through the Rork credential widget so they land in the agent runtime environment. Then the agent can: (1) git push to main, (2) curl Render deploy API, (3) verify production SHA matches GitHub HEAD.

blockers.blocker: Production is on stale commit 79c5b3cf. New 35 routes + 11 module stores + client service are committed locally (HEAD=df21cc0) but NOT deployed to Render.
blockers.exactFix: Push df21cc0 (or newer) to GitHub main → Render auto-deploys → verify /version matches SHA → test new endpoints live.

finalStatus: BLOCKED_ON_DEPLOY — All 28 modules code-complete, typecheck clean, iOS build passes. Awaiting credential injection to push + deploy + verify production.
